 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xdg","title":"Implement session garbage collection (slb session gc)","description":"## Task
Implement session garbage collection to clean up stale sessions.

## Background (from Edge Case 4)
Agents can crash without ending their session. Need to detect and clean up stale sessions.

## Command: slb session gc
- Find sessions where last_active_at < now - threshold (default 30 min)
- End these sessions automatically
- Report what was cleaned up

## Options
- --dry-run: Show what would be cleaned
- --threshold <duration>: Override inactivity threshold
- --force: Skip confirmation

## Files
- internal/cli/session.go (add gc subcommand)
- internal/db/sessions.go (FindStaleSessions already exists)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Finds stale sessions
- [ ] Ends them with proper audit trail
- [ ] --dry-run shows preview
- [ ] JSON output supported","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:47:52.300146943-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T20:27:50.934329424-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T20:27:50.934329424-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xdg","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-399.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:47:52.302301406-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xsn","title":"Implement TUI pattern removal review panel","description":"## Task
Implement the TUI view for human review of pattern removal requests.

## Background
Agents can request pattern removal with 'slb patterns request-removal', but only humans can approve. These pending requests should be visible in the TUI.

## Features
- Show pending pattern removal requests
- Display pattern, tier, reason for removal
- Approve/Reject actions
- Filter by status

## Integration
- Show in dashboard sidebar or dedicated view
- Navigate with keyboard shortcut 'm' for 'manage patterns'

## Files
- internal/tui/patterns/removal.go
- internal/tui/dashboard/dashboard.go (add panel or nav option)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Pending removals visible
- [ ] Human can approve/reject
- [ ] Clear UI for pattern details
- [ ] Keyboard navigation","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:13.142102845-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T22:54:33.855431602-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T22:54:33.855431602-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xsn","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-2t9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:48:13.1442582-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xva","title":"EPIC: Documentation & Distribution","description":"## Overview
Create documentation and set up distribution infrastructure: README, install scripts, GoReleaser, Homebrew.

## Background & Rationale
slb needs to be easy to install and use. The plan includes installation methods:
- One-line curl install
- go install
- Homebrew (macOS/Linux)

Documentation includes:
- README with quick start
- AGENTS.md blurb for integration
- --help text for all commands
- Shell completions

## Installation Methods (from plan)

### One-Line Install
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/main/install.sh | bash

### Go Install
go install github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/cmd/slb@latest

### Homebrew
brew install dicklesworthstone/tap/slb

## Shell Completions
- zsh: eval "$(slb completion zsh)"
- bash: eval "$(slb completion bash)"
- fish: slb completion fish | source

Provides:
- Command and flag completion
- Request ID completion from pending list
- Session ID completion from active sessions

## Documentation Files
- README.md (installation, quick start, examples)
- --help text (built into Cobra commands)
- AGENTS.md blurb (copy-paste section for integration)
- Quick reference card (slb with no args)

## Distribution Infrastructure
- .goreleaser.yaml
- scripts/install.sh
- .github/workflows/release.yml
- Homebrew formula

## Files
- README.md
- scripts/install.sh
- .goreleaser.yaml
- .github/workflows/release.yml

## Success Criteria
1. README is clear and complete
2. Install script works on Linux/macOS
3. GoReleaser produces binaries for all platforms
4. Shell completions work
5. AGENTS.md blurb is ready to copy","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:15:06.701589784-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T18:15:06.701589784-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xva","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-7js","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:15:06.703152795-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xva.2","title":"Configure GoReleaser for cross-platform builds","description":"## Task
Set up GoReleaser for automated binary releases.

## Platforms
- Linux (amd64, arm64)
- macOS (amd64, arm64 / Apple Silicon)
- Windows (amd64)

## .goreleaser.yaml
project_name: slb
version: 2

builds:
  - main: ./cmd/slb
    binary: slb
    env:
      - CGO_ENABLED=0  # Pure Go SQLite
    goos:
      - linux
      - darwin
      - windows
    goarch:
      - amd64
      - arm64
    ldflags:
      - -s -w
      - -X main.Version={{.Version}}
      - -X main.Commit={{.ShortCommit}}
      - -X main.Date={{.Date}}

archives:
  - format: tar.gz
    name_template: "{{ .ProjectName }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}"
    format_overrides:
      - goos: windows
        format: zip

checksum:
  name_template: checksums.txt

changelog:
  use: github
  sort: asc

brews:
  - repository:
      owner: Dicklesworthstone
      name: homebrew-tap
    folder: Formula
    homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb
    description: Simultaneous Launch Button for AI agent command approval
    install: |
      bin.install "slb"

## GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/release.yml)
- Triggered on tag push (v*)
- Runs GoReleaser
- Publishes to GitHub Releases
- Updates Homebrew tap

## Files
- .goreleaser.yaml
- .github/workflows/release.yml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Builds for all platforms
- [ ] Checksums generated
- [ ] Homebrew formula updated
- [ ] Release notes from changelog","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownCastle","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:04.180163575-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T19:59:08.556451228-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T19:59:08.556451228-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xva.2","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-v0z.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:04.181143541-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xva.3","title":"Create install.sh script and shell completions","description":"## Task
Create one-line installer script and shell completion support.

## install.sh
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Detect platform
OS=$(uname -s | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
ARCH=$(uname -m)

# Normalize arch
case $ARCH in
  x86_64) ARCH="amd64" ;;
  aarch64|arm64) ARCH="arm64" ;;
esac

# Get latest version
VERSION=$(curl -sL https://api.github.com/repos/Dicklesworthstone/slb/releases/latest | grep tag_name | cut -d'"' -f4)

# Download
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/releases/download/${VERSION}/slb_${OS}_${ARCH}.tar.gz"
curl -fsSL "$DOWNLOAD_URL" | tar -xz -C /tmp

# Install
sudo mv /tmp/slb /usr/local/bin/
echo "slb ${VERSION} installed successfully!"
echo "Run 'slb' for quick reference."

## Shell Completions
Cobra generates completions automatically:
- slb completion zsh
- slb completion bash
- slb completion fish
- slb completion powershell

Add to README:
```bash
# zsh (~/.zshrc)
eval "$(slb completion zsh)"

# bash (~/.bashrc)
eval "$(slb completion bash)"

# fish (~/.config/fish/config.fish)
slb completion fish | source
```

## What Completions Provide
- Command and subcommand names
- Flag names and values
- Request ID completion from pending list
- Session ID completion from active sessions

## Files
- scripts/install.sh
- internal/cli/completion.go (if customization needed)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Install script works on Linux/macOS
- [ ] Detects correct platform
- [ ] Installs to /usr/local/bin
- [ ] Shell completions work
- [ ] Dynamic request/session ID completion","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownCastle","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:34.668629149-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T20:14:51.517796614-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T20:14:51.517796614-06:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xva.3","depends_on_id":"simultaneous_launch_button-xva.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-13T18:27:34.669728777-06:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}


but helps achieve coverage goal.
